features.featureTitle: Save the uploaded image (0E4EB4A7-858B-4D8C-9F78-10EFB5808419.png) as the new DJ Fizz logo static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png, replacing the existing file. Then update the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/img[1] in frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx to reference /assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png. Ensure the image container and any parent wrapper elements have no light background classes (no bg-white, bg-gray, or similar) so the logo renders cleanly against the dark hero background with no visible checkerboard artifact.
